abba8c89-56ad-44d8-a17d-b5bb1fd9102f.doc_description: USDA’s Single Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program overview describing no-money-down, 100% financed rural home loans, borrower and property eligibility, loan terms, and how to apply through approved lenders.

b2d21c0e-30c5-4344-8bd5-22fa3cf28d91.doc_description: USDA Rural Development Single Family Housing Direct area loan limits listing effective March 7, 2025, organized by state and county/equivalent with county-specific maximum loan amounts and ineligible areas.

1e426b01-1e0f-4ec0-bf97-9a2e58d52fe2.doc_description: A USDA Rural Development HB-2-3550 servicing handbook table of contents covering Section 502/504 loan program overview, borrower servicing, payment subsidies, appraisal and insurance rules, appeals and civil rights, liquidation and debt settlement, and special collections procedures.

e38f6300-3888-4ebd-a0d6-361c2b9bf39d.doc_description: A USDA Rural Development overview of the Single Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program, explaining no-money-down rural home loans, borrower and property eligibility, loan terms, and how to apply through approved lenders.

2b030794-b181-4f64-b9bc-b7a253f78f7a.doc_description: A USDA Rural Development “Single Family Housing – Area Loan Limits” reference page effective 3-7-2025 that lets users select a state or territory to view county-level maximum loan amounts, including many areas at the standard $419,300 limit and others with higher or ineligible designations.

4303fa7e-d800-4814-841e-f5dda0868e6a.doc_description: A USDA HB-1-3555 Appendix 5 table of FY 2024 Guaranteed Housing Program income limits, showing county/metro-area adjusted income thresholds by household size for very low, low, and moderate income loan eligibility.

feed1a51-e63f-46a1-a374-3c10d320655b.doc_description: A table-of-contents-style USDA Rural Development HB-2-3550 handbook excerpt covering direct single-family housing program overview, servicing, payments, subsidies, special servicing, foreclosure, collections, appeals, appraisals, and the accompanying 7 CFR Part 3550 regulations.

4d68299d-77bf-400e-a904-d8bd8caf84e4.doc_description: A USDA Rural Development guide to the Single Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program, explaining eligibility, property requirements, and no-down-payment financing options for approved rural home loans.

a5795590-6fb3-4965-80a4-3c63902f4eeb.doc_description: A county-by-county USDA Rural Development Single Family Housing Direct area loan limits table effective 3-7-2025, listing eligible and ineligible jurisdictions across U.S. states and territories with varying maximum loan amounts.

49013d2f-2c65-4810-b749-8e3143436907.doc_description: A USDA Rural Development HB-1-3555 Appendix 5 table of FY 2024 guaranteed housing program income limits, listing very low, low, and moderate income thresholds by household size for Alabama counties and metro areas.
